body:
## Summary
- add a focused `--focus-religious-freedom-parallelism` content validator mode
- keep the full validator checking q116/q630/q633 source, CSV, and static religious-freedom option wording
- route the q116 mutation test through the focused validator and add routing coverage

## Verification
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-religious-freedom-parallelism`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern "religious-freedom option parallelism|focused content validation routing" tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false` with a temporary `node_modules` symlink to the shared install
- `git diff --check`
title: test(content): add focused q116 religious-freedom guard
